_comment: Neutral US placeholder data overlaid onto settings.getSettings responses by scripts/marketing-screenshots.mjs so marketing/store screenshots NEVER show a real customer site's data. The DB is not modified — this is a network overlay only. Values are deliberately generic (Acme / example.com / 555 numbers).

settings.org_description: Acme Corporation delivers dependable products and services to homes and businesses across the United States.
settings.og_description_override: Acme Corporation — dependable products and services across the USA.
